positive: An intricate, stylized illustration of a stylized owl perched on a geometric branch, surrounded by blooming celestial flora and minimalist forest elements. The owl should have a strong silhouette and expressive eyes. The overall style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern geometric pattern design, using deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) accented by gold leaf metallic ink detailing. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centralized, suitable for a repeating print pattern on fabric. Include subtle elements like moons, stars, and crystalline leaves, giving a mystical, enchanted forest vibe. The lines must be crisp, clean, and high-contrast.
